description.sourceText: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn 2. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by 30%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by 35%. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handiwork Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +17. (Does not stack)

While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by 25%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by 27% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.
While in party, increases the player's bow damage by 10%. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by 15%. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by 50%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by 500%.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances Neutral and Dark attacks by 15%.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by 15% while mounted.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by 4% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.
Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases by 10%.

When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Blizzard Spike. When this Pal uses Blizzard Spike, it has a x1.1/1.3/1.6/2/2.5 damage multiplier. Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to 1% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: 2600/2700/3000/3400/3900). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: 2900/3000/3300/3700/4200). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.
While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify 2. (Does not stack)
While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak. (Does not stack)
While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases the player's Attack by 30% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 1%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)
While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Neutral damage. (Does not stack) Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Attack of Electric Pals by 15%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden. Boosts jumping ability while mounted. This Pal's movement speed increases by +50% at night.
Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo)
Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Muddy 2. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5% for each other Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua)
While in party, increases Attack and Defense of Sweepa.
Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by 12% for each Swee in party.
When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.
When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.
While in party, restores 20% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)
Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by 80%. (Does not stack)
When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.
When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap.
While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by 15%. (Does not stack)
While in party, reduces Ore weight by 80%. (Does not stack)
While in party, reduces weight of Sulfur and Coal by 80%. Also improves player's and Pals' Ground damage to enemy weak points by 80%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Electric damage to weak points by 25%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 1%.
While in party, Ground Pals drop 40% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops various seeds when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by 20%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by 30%. (Does not stack)
While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind 2. (Does not stack)
While in party, grants 1 additional jump and 1 additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)
Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.
While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within 5 seconds. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigame begins with the capture gauge 7% higher than usual, and capture progress increases by 9% while the bars overlap. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by 15%. (Does not stack)
When activated, Wixen changes the player's attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 30%.
When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to Dark and increases Attack by 30%.
Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by -10%. (Does not stack)
Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by -15%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While at a base, increases the Transporting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15% less Ground damage and are immune to Muddy status. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by 10%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by 20%. (Does not stack)
While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by 100%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While fighting together, 15% increased chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)

When assigned to a Breeding Farm, egg production time is reduced by 100%.
